startups.name: Mercury
startups.description: Modern banking for startups, reworked for overlooked niches.
startups.sourceSummary: Mercury is a banking and financial operations platform for startups.
startups.pattern: A clean financial command center for business banking, cards, transfers, permissions, and cash reporting.
startups.buildAngle: Start as the workflow layer around existing bank accounts rather than becoming a bank.
startups.targetCustomer: Small operators with real money movement and no in-house finance team.

ideas.title: Banking dashboard for boutique accounting firms
ideas.problem: Small accounting firms manage cash questions across many client accounts with screenshots and spreadsheets.
ideas.whyItWorks: The buyer already handles client cash operations and can justify paying for faster monthly close workflows.
ideas.mvp: Client balance snapshots, transaction review queues, monthly close checklists, and accountant-ready exports.
ideas.goToMarket: Start with boutique firms that sell monthly advisory retainers.
ideas.pricing: $99-$399 per firm per month, plus client account tiers.

evidence.snippet: Mercury positions around startup banking and financial workflows.
